arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 20 this weekend and James Mason has collated our writers' best bets for all seven games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Mikel Merino agrees with Mikel Arteta as he makes 'scary' claim about Arsenal team-mate
arts.sum: Arsenal cut the gap to Liverpool at the top of the Premier League table with a 3-1 win against Brentford and one Gunners star certainly caught the eye among his teammates and manager

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners on brink of loan deal but await decision on striker's clause
arts.sum: Arsenal are expected to part ways with payers now the January transfer window is open - and they're also on the look out for reinforcements as they bid to finally win the league title

arts.ttl: Patient Arsenal rewarded with big win - Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta believes his side's "patience was rewarded" after a "big" 3-1 win at Brentford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's 2024 awards: Best player, most improved & more
arts.sum: A recap of 2024 for Arsenal, including the club's best player, top scorer and standout moment.

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend launches scathing rant: Two stars 'not good enough'
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Emmanuel Petit believes that there are several Gunners players who are not good enough to challenge for the Premier League title. The Frenchman, notorious for his controversial opinions, believes that Arsenal lack the quality to win the Premier League, with attackers Gabriel Martinelli and Gabriel Jesus singled out for criticism.

arts.ttl: Report: 'One of the best strikers in Europe' set for £50m price tag amid links with Arsenal and other PL giants
arts.sum: Arsenal, Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa, Manchester City and Manchester United have all been linked with Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani in recent weeks. With...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'still keen on raiding Premier League rivals for star striker' in shock move - as Mikel Arteta looks to boost forward options ahead of title run-in
arts.sum: The centre-forward is one of the hottest talents in the Premier League after progressing through the his club's youth system following a move there in 2021.

arts.ttl: 'Going to be a superstar': Liverpool and Arsenal told £67m attacking target would be 'a great buy for any team'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are among a number of Premier League teams interested in Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush. TBR Football’s chief correspondent Graeme Bailey recently confirmed...

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed huge Declan Rice suspension boost as Mikel Arteta masterstroke pays off
arts.sum: In the 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest after the November international break, Arteta left Havertz and Rice out of the starting XI, not turning to either of them throughout the game at all. Mikel Arteta's decision to leave Declan Rice out of Arsenal's starting XI against Brentford was a risk.
